failure_reason: Proved live DB execution for the Form-native application graph mutation wrappers in a rollback-safe throwaway Postgres. application-graph-live-db.fk ran through the Rust kernel and returned verdict 1111111: connect, fixture schema, create node plus revision readback, update node plus next revision readback, delete node plus edge cleanup readback, fixture cleanup, and close. Ordinary public mutation traffic remains on FastAPI until response projection, cache/side-effect proof, contributor-key audit proof, and a reversible public flip gate are complete.
